name: 10k-chaos-mix
description: 10K agents running at steady state while chaos drills execute: gateway kill mid-test, NATS partition, MinIO fill. Validates agent offline buffering (48h queue) and server recovery.

chaos_events.expected: agents buffer events in SQLite queue; reconnect on restart
gateway buffers in memory; replays on reconnect; no event loss
screenshots fail gracefully; keystroke blobs also fail; events with blob_ref errors are flagged but not dropped

notes.agent_offline_buffer: 48h SQLite queue must absorb events during gateway kill
notes.recovery_time_target: gateway restart < 30s; all agents reconnect < 5 min
